name: CTASection

examples.title: Basic CTA
examples.code:
<CTASection Title="Ready to build with Lumeo?"
            Subtitle="Install the package and ship your first component in minutes.">
    <Actions>
        <Button>Get started</Button>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Read the docs</Button>
    </Actions>
</CTASection>

examples.title: Single Action
examples.code:
<CTASection Title="Join the newsletter"
            Subtitle="Monthly updates on new components and releases. No spam.">
    <Actions>
        <Button>Subscribe</Button>
    </Actions>
</CTASection>

mdSummary:
# CTASection

CTASection component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Marketing
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/cta-section

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| CTASection | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| CTASection | TitleSlot | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| CTASection | Subtitle | `string?` | `` |  |
| CTASection | Actions | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| CTASection | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CTASection | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `TitleSlot` (CTASection) — RenderFragment slot
- `Actions` (CTASection) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<CTASection />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/CTASection/CTASection.razor`
